title: Goldwagen George honoured to be nominated: A thank you to our community
description: BUSINESS NEWS - We at Goldwagen George are...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - We at Goldwagen George are honoured to be nominated for the Best of George Readers’ Choice Awards!


> This recognition highlights our commitment to providing exceptional service to you, our valued customers.


Since 2005, it has been our pleasure to serve the George community and we are proud to be part of your memories and experiences with quality vehicle parts.

Your continued support is the foundation of everything we do and we could not be more grateful.

Goldwagen George - Keep on driving.

Please vote for us on https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/ before 17 July 2025.

Remember to follow us on Facebook.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
